name: Sentrial
long_description:
Sentrial is the observability platform for AI agents in production. 

When your agent loops indefinitely, hallucinates, or frustrates users, Sentrial detects it in real-time, diagnoses the root cause, and recommends specific fixes. We provide the monitoring, evaluation, and debugging infrastructure that traditional tools weren't built for, so teams can ship agents with confidence and iterate based on real production behavior, not just evals/benchmarks.
